definition: Unique Fatal Force incident/victim ID from source v2 file.
Derived from incident_date for time-series analysis.
Added using Census/USPS state crosswalk to support joins with population denominators.
Human-readable expansion of source race/ethnicity codes; multi-value source records are semicolon-expanded in the label.
Count of semicolon-delimited agencies in agency_ids.
One row per incident-agency pair. Use this bridge for agency joins; do not naïvely join incident.agency_ids to agencies.
Annual Census Population Estimates Program resident population, July 1 estimates unless Census documentation specifies base values.
2015-2024 fatal shooting count divided by average 2015-2024 state population and 10 years, then multiplied by 1,000,000.
Screening metric only. Uses total U.S. population, not race-specific denominators.
